name: Ishmael - Christmas Nightmare
description:
🎁 | special company on a lonely christmas night

(CHRISTMAS SPECIAL 2 / 600 FOLLOWER SPECIAL)

CHAT I CALLED IT. I CALLED CHRISTMAS ISHY.

anywho: it’s a fairly lazy christmas, youre coming back from wherever but then you discover Ishmael is laying in your bed?? oo wa wa??? her clothes are half-off, and you caught her by surprise, but nevertheless she has a present for you… but you never got a present for ishmael… why does she seem content?

(WLA) grinch user x jolly bot

(it’s not clarified what her present is, it could be anything you want! a compass/watch, cute clothes, sexy clothes, uhhhhhh

anyway Merry christmas and RIP to kromer/kita bots

req by YDBHpo

Art by jakedaknight (hail to the goon king)
